bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 7 day(s) · scope=morning-brief-editor (editorial — sees all) Items: 12 · Forecasts emitted: 3 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / quality review, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-06-29 · [research_task] Determine core CPI transmission from Hormuz oil shock

DONE · owner=chief-economist

The global macro analyst argues the Hormuz blockade is a level supply-side shock and warns of policy error, while indicators from the chief economist suggest sticky inflation. The final verdict on core CPI transmission is referred to the chief economist. [Source: Theme 2]

  • Outcome: Incorporated in Macro/Central-Bank Signals and Asia implications: treated Hormuz oil shock as limited direct core CPI pass-through but persistent second-round/Fed risk.

2026-06-29 · [research_task] 评估造船主机交期拉长对毛利的影响

DONE · owner=industrials-analyst · research discussion=评估造船主机交期拉长对毛利的影响 (led by industrials-analyst)

向 industrials-analyst 确认低速二冲程主机交期拉长是否会影响中国船舶下半年大中型船舶的交付及毛利修复节奏 (Section IV).

  • Outcome: research discussion "评估造船主机交期拉长对毛利的影响" → completed | cards=1 | last-card: 向 industrials-analyst 确认低速二冲程主机交期拉长是否会影响中国船舶下半年大中型船舶的交付及毛利修复节奏 (Section IV).

2026-06-29 · [research_task] 评估核电 CfD 推广与地方债流动性影响

DONE · owner=china-macro · research discussion=评估核电 CfD 推广与地方债流动性影响 (led by china-macro)

向 china-macro 询问核电 CfD 机制在核电大省的推广时间表，以及三季度地方债发行对 CNH HIBOR 的冲击 (Section IV).

  • Outcome: research discussion "评估核电 CfD 推广与地方债流动性影响" → completed | cards=2 | last-card: 截至2026-06-25，核电 CfD 在五个目标省份呈现“制度已具备、启动不一致”：浙江和海南已在2026年材料中出现核电政府授权合约式机制；福建已把福清、宁德、漳州核电深度纳入中长期交易并设置签约比例，但未写明核电 CfD；山东和江苏具备机组交易、结算、信息披露和风险控制等市场基础，但已核验规则未给出核电 CfD 官方时间表。结论支持政策扩散方向，但需要把扩散理解为省级交易规则逐步植入，而不是全国一次性排期。 | → 2 forecast(s) on DRC,HKMA, 0 position(s) opened

  • Forecasts: 2 (0 positions); tickers: DRC, HKMA

2026-06-29 · [research_task] 验证 InP 激光芯片国产替代及 Q4 进度

DONE · owner=tmt-analyst · research discussion=验证 InP 激光芯片国产替代及 Q4 进度 (led by tmt-analyst)

向 tmt-analyst 确认 800G 及 1.6T 高速 AI 光模块中国产芯片在 Q3/Q4 客户验证的具体寿命测试进度及替代计划 (Section IV).

  • Outcome: research discussion "验证 InP 激光芯片国产替代及 Q4 进度" → completed | cards=4 | last-card: SiPh插拔模块与CPO架构的推进，如何影响下一代液冷/风冷散热方案的演进以及超大规模数据中心的电力扩容压力？

2026-06-29 · [research_task] 调查 InP 芯片国产验证寿命测试瓶颈

DONE · owner=tmt-analyst · research discussion=调查 InP 芯片国产验证寿命测试瓶颈 (led by tmt-analyst)

需向 tmt-analyst 求证国产 100G/200G EML 及高功率 CW DFB 激光芯片在头部模块厂进行 2000-5000 小时 Life-test 的具体失效读数 (Section II.3).

  • Outcome: research discussion "调查 InP 芯片国产验证寿命测试瓶颈" → completed | cards=5 | last-card: 评估变压器、开关设备等关键电力设备的交期（Lead time）压力，以及中国西部绿电接入容量的确定性是否会成为AI集群扩容的硬约束。

2026-06-29 · [research_task] 跟踪核心科技龙头两融维持担保比例动态变化

DONE

跟踪新易盛、中际旭创、拓荆科技在反弹过程中的两融偿还与融资买入流量，评估 CMR 是否能稳定回升 (Section II.2).

  • Outcome: research:新易盛, 中际旭创, 拓荆科技 → completed | dir=sessions/1c7b4fe3-5cbd-4d8e-bbf7-cf9185b27393 | summary: 研究对象: 新易盛, 中际旭创, 拓荆科技 | → 1 forecast(s) on 新易盛, 中际旭创, 拓荆科技, 0 position(s) opened

  • Forecasts: 1 (0 positions); tickers: 新易盛, 中际旭创, 拓荆科技
